violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety certified with RIDOH. Application provided. New Violation. Correct By: 06/05/2025
The date when the last shellfish was used from the bag must be noted on the shellfish tag. New Violation. Correct By: 06/05/2025

Various foods were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 06/05/2025

The sink used for food preparation is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. Air gap handout provided. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/05/2025
The date when the last shellfish was used from the bag must be noted on the shellfish tag. New Violation. Correct By: 07/02/2024

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. Tube was replaced at the time of inspection and retested. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/02/2024

The sink used for food preparation is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/02/2024

The sink used for food preparation is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/18/2023

Various foods were observed held at 46-48 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Food was voluntarily disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/13/2023
The Reach-In single door was frozen over and not able to hold foods at an adequate temperature. Unit was taken out of service and refrigeration was called. New Violation. Correct By: 07/13/2023
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the dish machine. New Violation. Correct By: 07/13/2023

The sink used for food preparation is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. Inspector sent person in charge a picture of the proper air gap. New Violation. Correct By: 07/13/2023
